<?php namespace Spatie\LaravelRay\Payloads; use Spatie\Ray\ArgumentConverter; use Spatie\Ray\Payloads\Payload; class EventPayload extends Payload { /** @var string */ protected $eventName; /** @var object|mixed|null */ protected $event = null; /** @var array */ protected $payload = []; public function __construct(string $eventName, array $payload) { $this->eventName = $eventName; class_exists($eventName) ? $this->event = $payload[0] : $this->payload = $payload; } public function getType(): string { return 'event'; } public function getContent(): array { return [ 'name' => $this->eventName, 'event' => $this->event ? ArgumentConverter::convertToPrimitive($this->event) : null, 'payload' => count($this->payload) ? ArgumentConverter::convertToPrimitive($this->payload) : null, 'class_based_event' => ! is_null($this->event), ]; } }
